<think>Looking at the <info> from DOC2_A1, I can clearly see this document is titled "湖南国科微电子股份有限公司2024年第一季度报告" (Hunan Guoke Microelectronics Co., Ltd. 2024 Q1 Report). The securities code is 300672 and the securities abbreviation is "国科微".

The question asks about "亿纬锂能" (EVE Energy), which is a completely different company. This document is about 湖南国科微电子 (Guoke Microelectronics), NOT 亿纬锂能 (EVE Energy).

1. This document is for 湖南国科微电子股份有限公司, not 亿纬锂能
